summary: Made a surgical closing-beat adjustment so the chapter exits on Tomás's post-killing entrenchment against the ongoing relay-message backdrop, rather than repeating chapter 9's terminal-chime/helpful-offer handoff.
edits: Revised the final paragraph to remove the repeated terminal-chime/helpful-message exit beat.
